category_sources: Official README describes librespot as a Spotify Connect receiver/client library.
source_facts.description says it is an open source Spotify client library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo points to the librespot-org/librespot project.
docs_sources: Official README points users to the GitHub wiki for usage options and to the docs folder for protocol documentation.
Official repository README is the fallback overview documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/librespot-org/librespot, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official README describes Spotify Connect receiver behavior and Rust implementation context.
source_facts.description identifies a Spotify client library.
